rationale: Single-crate Rust library (bytes) with a clean src/ + tests/ + benches/ layout and a Cargo.toml/Cargo.lock; gazelle_rust + rules_rust with crate_universe is the source-native port.
module_bazel:
module(
    name = "bytes",
    version = "0.0.0",
)

bazel_dep(name = "rules_rust", version = "0.70.0")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle_rust", version = "0.1.0")
bazel_dep(name = "gazelle", version = "0.51.3")
bazel_dep(name = "bazel_skylib", version = "1.9.0")
bazel_dep(name = "platforms", version = "1.1.0")

rust = use_extension("@rules_rust//rust:extensions.bzl", "rust")
rust.toolchain(
    edition = "2021",
    versions = ["1.85.0"],
)
use_repo(rust, "rust_toolchains")
register_toolchains("@rust_toolchains//:all")

crate = use_extension("@rules_rust//crate_universe:extensions.bzl", "crate")
crate.from_cargo(
    name = "crates",
    cargo_lockfile = "//:Cargo.lock",
    manifests = ["//:Cargo.toml"],
)
use_repo(crate, "crates")
root_build:
load("@gazelle//:def.bzl", "gazelle", "gazelle_binary")

# gazelle:rust_crates_index crates

gazelle_binary(
    name = "gazelle_bin",
    languages = [
        "@gazelle_rust//:rust",
    ],
)

gazelle(
    name = "gazelle",
    gazelle = ":gazelle_bin",
)
anticipated_risks: Cargo feature flags (std/serde/extra-platforms) not mapped to crate features by gazelle
doc tests in src/lib.rs not run by rust_test
